titleStmt.title: SII 34.109: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 109. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north and west walls of the central shrine in the Piplikēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Rājarāja I, 27th year = A.D. 1012.

One Chiṟukuḍaiyār Kāḷi Ādittaṉ who investigated on behalf of the king (dēvarkaḷ sōdiṉai pōnda) the income and expenses of the temple of Tiruveṟumbiyūr Mahādēvar made some new arrangement for the services in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumakaḷ pOlap perunilaccelviyun taṉakkE Urimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷa kāntaḷūr
ccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi vēṅkai nāṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu nuḷampapāṭiyun taṭikaipāṭiyum kuṭama
laināṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamu meṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamu milaṭṭapāṭi Ēḻarai Ilakkamun ti
ṇṭiṟal veṉṟittaṇṭāṟkoṇṭu taṉṉeḻil vaḷar Ūḻiyuḷellāyāṇṭun toḻutakaivi
ḷaṅkum yāṇṭē ceḻiyarait tēcukuḷ śrīkōrājarājakēsari paṉmarāna śrī
rājarāja tēvarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 7 Āvatu pāṇṭikulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭukku
tēvarkaḷ cōtiṉaipōnta ciṟukuṭaiyār kāḷi Ātittaṉ tiruveṟumpi
yūr māhātēvar mutalum cilavum kēṭṭu māṇiañcukku nilam O
ṉṟēkālāl māṇi 1 kku nellu kuṟuṇi Irunā
ḻiyāka māṇi kku nīkkivanta nellu nūṟṟu E
ṇpattu Eḻukalaṉē tūṇi patakku ni
ttyayam toṭum māṇ Añcukku nellu nū
ṟṟu Irupattu Eḻukalane tūṇipatakkum māṇ
Añciṉukkum Ākkiya māṇ Ira
ṇṭināl vāṅkiṉa nilam Eḻumā
varai muntirikaikīḻ mukkāllā A
ṭaippaṭi mutalām nellu A
ṟupatiṉ kalattāl niccam
Uḻakkeṇṇaiykku nellu kuṟuṇiyāka Iraṇṭu tiruno
ntāviḷakku Eṇṇai Uriykku vanta nel nicati nellu
nel nāḻiyum tirumalai Aṭi ṉa vāṭavar Eṅkaḷ nilattiṉ mēllai ṭimaṅkai m koṇṭu muṉkōṭukiḻā Aḷi maṉ mēl m Iraṇṭukū cantirātittavaṟ U kaṭavom kaṇattān cantiraṉ
Digital edition of SII 34.109 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
